changeSet.author: reagan-meant
changeSet.comment: Add Environmental Reports as a top-level folder under Reports menu

changeSet.author: reagan-meant
changeSet.comment: Add Laporan Hasil (Compliance Report) under Environmental Reports folder
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.menu (id, parent_id, presentation_order, element_id, action_url, display_key, is_active) SELECT nextval('clinlims.menu_seq'), (SELECT id FROM clinlims.menu WHERE element_id = 'menu_reports_environmental'), 1, 'menu_reports_environmental_laporanhasil', '/LaporanHasil', 'sideNav.label.laporanHasil', true WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM clinlims.menu WHERE element_id = 'menu_reports_environmental_laporanhasil' ) AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM clinlims.menu WHERE element_id = 'menu_reports_environmental' );
